title: Stock market crash erases Rs 7 lakh crore investors’ wealth in minutes; top reasons for fall
content: Stock market crash today: Higher crude oil prices and a hawkish stance from the US Federal Reserve weighed heavily on investor sentiment.Within minutes of trading, the sharp decline erased over Rs 7 lakh crore from the total market capitalisation of BSE-listed firms.

title: Just 350m away! Projectile strikes near Bushehr nuclear reactor, IAEA flags near miss
content: A projectile struck near Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant, approximately 350 meters from the reactor, according to the IAEA. The agency confirmed no damage to the reactor or injuries, but stressed that attacks near nuclear facilities violate safety principles. Russia's Rosatom reported the strike took place Tuesday and is urging de-escalation amid ongoing regional hostilities.

title: Watch: Uprooted trees to flying chairs, Pak sees widespread destruction due to storm
content: Tragic downpour in Karachi claimed at least 21 lives as strong winds and rain caused widespread destruction. Walls, roofs, and trees collapsed, leading to fatal accidents across the city. The deadliest incident in Moach Goth saw 13 people perish when a wall gave way. Rescue efforts are underway amidst warnings of continued unstable weather

title: AI-led layoffs of up to 20,000 in numbers may be coming to HSBC
content: HSBC is reportedly planning significant job cuts, potentially impacting 10% of its workforce, or around 20,000 employees, over the next three to five years.  Chief Executive Georges Elhedery is leveraging Artificial Intelligence to streamline middle and back-office operations, aiming for greater cost efficiency and productivity.  Non-client facing roles are expected to be most affected as the bank explores AI-driven changes.

title: Nvidia’s Jensen Huang becomes first CEO to roll out token budgets for recruitment
content: Nvidia's CEO, Jensen Huang, proposes a novel compensation strategy: annual "token budgets" for engineers. He believes this will significantly boost productivity, potentially doubling an engineer's compensation and becoming a key recruitment tool in Silicon Valley. This move reflects a growing trend of integrating AI compute power into compensation packages to attract top talent.

title: PCB under fire after report claims Babar, Fakhar played World Cup injured
content: Pakistan cricket faces a new controversy. Questions surround the fitness of Babar Azam and Fakhar Zaman during T20 World Cup selections. Medical evaluations flagged concerns after the tournament. Both players reportedly played with injuries. This has led to a review of their fitness clearances. Babar is now rehabilitating. Fakhar has returned to domestic cricket.

title: Assam election 2026: BJP releases list of candidates; CM Himanta to contest from Jalukbari
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party has unveiled its initial list of 88 candidates for the Assam assembly elections, with chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma contesting from Jalukbari. The party has finalized seat-sharing with AGP and BPF, aiming to retain power. The announcement follows the declaration of the poll schedule for the 126-member assembly.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform will transition to a mobile-only experience, aiming for greater focus and growth. This move follows significant investment and struggles to attract users, with the Reality Labs division reporting substantial losses.

title: ‘What’s the big deal?’: Ashwin shuts down hype over Shivam Dube’s train ride
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has commented on Shivam Dube's train journey after India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory. Ashwin believes such everyday experiences should not be sensationalized. He advocates for international cricketers to enjoy simple moments. Dube traveled by train to reunite with his family. He was a key player in India's successful campaign.

title: From 'he helps' to 'he goes on the computer': Kids’ take on their dads’ jobs goes viral
content: A heartwarming viral Instagram reel showcases children's innocent perceptions of their fathers' professions. While the dads are engineers, scientists, and problem-solvers, their children believe they simply "make snacks," "go on the computer," or "help." This adorable contrast highlights how, to children, their fathers are defined by their presence and small acts of kindness rather than their complex careers.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' vs 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' box office collection day 1
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage thriller, 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge', starring Ranveer Singh, has stormed ticket windows following a record-breaking Rs. 43 crore paid previews. Targeting a historic Rs. 100 crore opening day worldwide, the sequel is currently running across a massive 8,928 shows. On the other hand, Pawan Kalyan’s 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' is reasserting the Power Star’s local dominance, capitalizing on the Ugadi and Gudi Padwa festivities.

title: AI warfare: How China is integrating tech into aerial refuelling after deadly US tanker crash
content: China's military is integrating AI into aerial refuelling to optimize tanker support for combat aircraft in real-time. This system aims to improve efficiency, reduce delays, and maximize mission endurance, reflecting a broader push for AI in high-tempo combat scenarios. The move also highlights efforts to mitigate risks associated with complex aerial operations.

title: Ajit Agarkar seeks 2027 extension, will BCCI agree with no clear successor in sight?
content: With Ajit Agarkar seeking extension on his tenure as chief selector until the 2027 ODI World Cup, the BCCI is considering his request following India's recent ICC title wins. Discussions are ongoing regarding his future and potential successors. The board faces a decision as India prepares for upcoming tournaments and potential player transitions.

title: Assam polls: Cong's Prateek withdraws candidature after father Pradyut Bordoloi joins BJP
content: Congress candidate Prateek Bordoloi has withdrawn his nomination from the Margherita constituency. This move follows his father, Prayut Bordoloi, a former minister, joining the BJP. Prateek stated that continuing as a Congress candidate was not appropriate under the circumstances. He reaffirmed his loyalty to the Congress party. The party is yet to announce a replacement candidate for Margherita.

title: 'No intel on Iran sneak attack, Khamenei was moderating nukes': Trump ex-aide's big claims
content: Former Trump aide Joe Kent claims Iran wasn't close to nuclear power and that the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei moderated the program. Kent also asserted Israel drew the US into the recent conflict, contradicting official "imminent threat" justifications. His resignation and subsequent FBI probe into classified leaks highlight deep divisions.

title: TOISA 2025: UP dominates with four nominations in Athlete of the Year category
content: The Times of India Sports Awards 2025 will honour India's top athletes in Lucknow on March 21, 2026. This edition's nominations highlight exceptional performances from Uttar Pradesh athletes, with four dominating the Track and Field Athlete of the Year categories. Gulveer Singh, Sachin Yadav, Parul Chaudhary, and Rupal Chaudhary have all achieved significant milestones in 2025.

title: Israel bombs South Pars: Why does this gas field matter so much to Iran — and the world?
content: Israel struck Iran's major South Pars gas field, a major energy source, following a US-Israel operation that killed Iran's leader. The attack, which the US denies prior knowledge of, escalates regional tensions and raises global concerns about energy supply disruptions. Iran has warned of retaliation against other Gulf energy sites.

title: Pune cab horror: Techie’s finger partially severed after driver bites him over fare dispute
content: An IT professional in Pune had two fingers of his left hand bitten by a cab driver after a dispute over fare. The driver allegedly refused the app-quoted price and demanded payment by meter, leading to an assault. The driver has been arrested and charged under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.

title: Is Shashi Tharoor in the race for Kerala CM? Congress MP answers
content: Congress leader Shashi Tharoor has ruled himself out of the Kerala chief ministerial race, stating he is not contesting the upcoming assembly elections. Tharoor emphasized that the chief minister should be chosen from elected MLAs and expressed confidence in the UDF's prospects, predicting a strong seat tally.

title: HDFC Bank share price plunges 9% after part-time chairman's sudden resignation
content: The stock movement is in focus after HDFC Bank part-time chairman and independent director Atanu Chakraborty resigned abruptly. The Reserve Bank of India has cleared the appointment of Keki Mistry, former chief executive of HDFC, as interim part-time chairman.

title: Vikram Doraiswami appointed India’s next Ambassador to China
content: Vikram K Doraiswami will be India's new Ambassador to China. The ministry of external affairs announced his appointment. Doraiswami is a senior Indian Foreign Service officer. He currently serves as High Commissioner to the United Kingdom. He is expected to take up his new role shortly. This appointment occurs as India and China continue diplomatic discussions on bilateral issues.

title: Messi scripts history, betters Ronaldo to become fastest ever to 900 goals
content: Lionel Messi has etched his name in history, becoming the second male footballer to achieve 900 official career goals during Inter Miami's CONCACAF Champions Cup match. Though his team was eliminated, Messi's milestone places him alongside Cristiano Ronaldo in an elite scoring club.  He reached this incredible feat in fewer games than Ronaldo, further solidifying his legendary status.

title: Gold, silver price prediction today: Will gold reach Rs 1.65 lakh/10 gms & silver Rs 2.85 lakh/kg?
content: Gold and silver price prediction: Gold prices may see some upside swing, while silver prices may move up to Rs 285,000, says Abhilash Koikkara, Head - Forex & Commodities, Nuvama Professional Clients Group.

title: Gujarat goes Uttarakhand way, to make registration of live-ins must
content: Gujarat has introduced the Uniform Civil Code (UCC), 2026 Bill, aiming to standardize personal laws for marriage, divorce, succession, and live-in relationships across communities, with exemptions for Scheduled Tribes. The bill mandates registration of marriages and divorces, bans polygamy, and sets a legal framework for live-in relationships and remarriage after divorce.

title: Iran missile hits Qatar's Ras Laffan, world’s largest LNG hub - Watch
content: Iran attacked Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City, a major gas export hub. The strike caused significant damage to Liquefied Natural Gas facilities. Former US President Donald Trump issued a strong warning against further attacks on Qatar. This incident follows an Israeli strike on Iran's South Pars gas field. Iran's President had previously warned of severe global consequences.

title: Woman pushes daughter, 8, in front of train, tells bystanders not to save her
content: An eight-year-old girl is in critical condition after her mother allegedly pushed her in front of a moving train at Narmadapuram railway station. The incident, captured on CCTV, shows the child suffering severe injuries. Preliminary investigations suggest a mental health angle for the mother, who reportedly asked bystanders not to intervene.

title: 'Israel lashed out': Trump distances US from gas field strike; warns Iran after Qatar LNG hub hit
content: Israel struck Iran's South Pars gas field, prompting retaliation against Qatar's energy facilities. US President Donald Trump blamed Israel for the initial strike and warned of massive US retaliation if Qatar is attacked again. Iran also targeted UAE energy sites. Global energy markets are experiencing significant price surges due to these escalating conflicts.

title: 'I’ve stopped drinking': Star India player's honest admission before IPL 2026
content: Yuzvendra Chahal is embracing a fresh start with Punjab Kings for IPL 2026, prioritizing fitness after a challenging period.  The veteran leg-spinner has quit alcohol, aiming to deliver his best. Despite past personal and professional hurdles, including injuries, Chahal remains IPL's leading wicket-taker and is determined to lead Punjab to their maiden title.

title: How gluten intolerance triggers persistent gastric issues
content: Experiencing bloating, fatigue, or stomach pain after meals? It might be gluten intolerance, medically known as Non-Celiac Gluten Sensitivity (NCGS). Unlike celiac disease, NCGS doesn't damage the gut but causes discomfort. Experts urge proper medical evaluation to distinguish it from celiac disease and manage symptoms effectively for better daily well-being.

title: Happy Ugadi 2026: 75+ wishes, images, quotes, cards, and GIFs
content: As Ugadi 2026 approaches, the article offers a guide to celebrating the New Year with heartfelt messages and aesthetic visuals. It delves into the philosophy of the Ugadi Pachadi, symbolizing life's diverse experiences, and provides tailored greetings for family, friends, and professional contacts. The piece also highlights modern trends in sharing wishes, encouraging personal touches over generic forwards.

title: Rishabh Pant returns to IPL grind, chasing another India comeback
content: Rishabh Pant is gearing up for a crucial IPL season.  He is working hard to regain his spot in India's white-ball squad.  Recent practice sessions and time with Yuvraj Singh show his dedication.  A strong IPL performance could secure his place for the 2027 ODI World Cup.  Pant is focused on his game and mental strength.

title: Junior colleges to reopen on April 1 for second year students in Andhra Pradesh
content: The Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh, has released the annual academic programme (calendar) for the intermediate course (both general and vocational streams) for the academic year 2026–27

title: What does passed in ‘Guillotine’ mean in parliament?
content: Guillotine is a key parliamentary tool used to fast track budget approval by putting every pending ‘Demands For Grants’ to votes at once

title: Maharashtra staff unions serve strike notice for April 21 over pension, recruitment issues
content: Employee unions have formally informed the State government of their decision to proceed with the agitation

title: Not a CM probable; ideally post should go to elected MLA: Shashi Tharoor
content: Exuding confidence of a UDF victory, Mr. Tharoor said there is 10 years of anti-incumbency against the LDF government

title: Assam polls: BJP releases first list of 88 candidates, CM Sarma to contest from Jalukbari
content: According to the list, Bhupen Kumar Borah, who also joined the BJP recently after leaving the Congress, will contest from Bihpura seat.

title: Canadian High Commissioner meets Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi to discuss investment
content: India-Canada partnership gains new momentum, High Commissioner calls UP an emerging hub of investment and innovation

title: Fisherman missing as country boat capsizes off Pudukottai coast
content: Kuppuraj went missing after the boat capsized, while his son managed to hold on to the vessel and was rescued by other fishermen

title: Transgender persons bill 'draconian', expect no better from government: Derek O'Brien
content: In a post on X, the TMC leader expressed his disappointment, stating that he expected "no better" from a government with a "dubious record."

title: 'Don't put cart before horse': Court rejects Lalu's plea seeking unrelied documents for trial
content: Special Judge Vishal Gogne underlined that providing these documents en bloc would not only "place the cart before the horse" but also throw the judicial process into "complete disarray".

title: Kerala Assembly polls: BJP announces second list of 39 candidates; Kummanam to contest from Aranmula
content: C.C. Mukundan, ousted CPI legislator who later joined BJP, to seek mandate from Nattika, while B. Gopalakrishnan is fielded in Guruvayur

title: Delhi wakes up to cloudy weather with light rain, minimum temperature at 17.6°C
content: The IMD stated that Safdarjung and Lodhi Road recorded 8.2 mm of rainfall each, while the Ridge station received 8.6 mm and Palam recorded 6.2 mm.

title: 1,000 Indians still in Iran; 23,000 students in Gulf could not appear in CBSE exams: External Affairs Ministry
content: This Ministry conveyed this to the Parliamentary Standing Committee on External Affairs; “We got some answers. We didn’t get all. The Foreign Secretary was not available,” Shashi Tharoor, chairman of the panel, said

title: UDF to announce candidates for all 140 Kerala Assembly seats today, says V.D. Satheesan
content: Speaking at Kochi airport on his return from Delhi, Satheesan says the party has already cleared 95 names, which will also be released later in the day

title: How parties fared in 2021 West Bengal elections and subsequent by-elections
content: As West Bengal prepares for 2026 assembly elections, a brief evaluation on how Trinamool Congress and BJP fared in 2021 polls

title: BJP announces candidates for bypolls in Goa, Karnataka, Nagaland, Tripura
content: Veerabhadrayya Charantimath will contest from the Bagalkot seat, and Srinivas T. Dasakariyappa will join the fray from Davanagere South seat

title: Kerala Assembly polls: UDF likely to field T.O. Mohanan in Kannur as AICC bars sitting MPs from contesting
content: On K. Sudhakaran’s insistence on contesting despite the AICC decision, Mohanan says he will respond after the official announcement

title: World Happiness Report 2026: The social media and happiness connect
content: Communications, news, learning, and content creation are associated with higher life satisfaction, while social media, gaming, and browsing for fun are associated with lower life evaluations, the report found

title: Relief to 2.22 crore power consumers in Bihar, Regulatory Commission announces no tariff hike for next FY
content: Commission rejects Discoms’ proposal for 35 paise tariff hike across categories. It also merges two slabs into one for three categories of consumers. One slab for urban domestic consumers, rural commercial users & urban commercial consumers.

title: India’s frogs are finding allies from citizen science to sanctuaries
content: India is home to more than 450 amphibian species, many of them threatened by climate change and habitat loss. Conservation programs across the country are turning the tide — and ordinary citizens can now join the effort

title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: Assam CM Himanta to contest from Jalukbari; Pinarayi Vijayan files nomination from Dharmadam
content: BJP Tamil Nadu chief Nainar Nagenthran denies any hitch in the seat-sharing talks with ally AIADMK ahead of the April 23 Assembly polls and said the number of constituencies will be finalised soon.

title: As West Asia war threatens gas supply, remembering a gas grid India never built
content: India’s push for the National Coal Gasification Mission to secure energy independence recalls a visionary 1955 proposal by Syed Husain Zaheer; initially dismissed by policymakers, Zaheer’s plan for a national gas grid was tragically vindicated by the 1973 global oil shock

title: Maharashtra government to issue ban on use of plastic flowers
content: Mr. Fadnavis was responding to the concerns raised by BJP MLC Sadashiv Khot around the increased use of plastic flowers, which is impacting the market of floriculture farmers

title: India, Pakistan ties ‘remain a risk’ for nuclear conflict: U.S. Intelligence
content: The report stated that “President Trump’s intervention de-escalated the most recent nuclear tensions”

title: Mumbai will not move towards gang wars: says CM Fadnavis on attacks on celebrities
content: A series of high-profile firing incidents in Mumbai between 2024 and 2026, involving actor Salman Khan, politician Baba Siddique, and filmmaker Rohit Shetty, have been linked to Lawrence Bishnoi’s gang by the Mumbai police

title: Three luxury cars gutted in fire accident in Vellore
content: The fire also spread to two adjoining houses and damaged wooden windows and walls of the houses; no injuries were reported

title: Election officials seize 53 panchaloha idols, unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content: Vehicle-checks was done as part of the enforcement of Model Code of Conduct for 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections

title: Local wildlife enthusiasts and forest officials fill water troughs in Vellore, Ranipet forests
content: Filling of water troughs in Reserve Forests will be done till May-end before the onset of southwest monsoon

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Three-way firefight in Pala
content: The outcome of this election could mark the culmination of years of political twists and turns the Assembly constituency has witnessed since the death of K.M. Mani, the Kerala Congress patriarch

title: Jharkhand money laundering case: ED files fifth supplementary Prosecution Complaint involving former Minister Alamgir Alam
content: ED asserted that so far the federal agency has conducted 52 searches under Section 17 of the PMLA across Jharkhand, Delhi, and Bihar; arrested 9 persons

title: Haryana Rajya Sabha polls: Congress’ win nothing short of a hard lesson
content: Meanwhile, the BJP cornered the Congress over its allegations surrounding the Rajya Sabha polls, by mounting a sharp attack on the Congress

title: Three die while cleaning septic tank in Raipur Hospital; incident sparks outrage over sanitation workers safety
content: The mishap took place at Ram Krishna Care Hospital in Pachpedi Naka area where the victims entered the nearly 20-feet-deep septic tank without any proper safety gear, said a police officer

title: How Maharashtra Legislature cleared the Freedom of Religion Bill, and why most of the opposition parties did not oppose it
content: Once the Governor gives his assent, Maharashtra will become the 13th State in India to have a legislation against forced conversions

title: Odisha suspends officials over fire tragedy
content: The disciplinary action was taken even as different inquiries were going on to find lapses leading to fire

title: NC, PDP spar over Bill pertaining to land rights in J&K
content: NC legislator Tanvir Sadiq has submitted the J&K Land Grants (Restoration and Protection) Bill, 2025 to the J&K Assembly as a private member’s bill

title: Mirwaiz, Imran Ansari condemn Larijani’s killing
content: Ansari, also a Shia cleric who heads the All J&K Shia Association, said, “With deep sorrow and heavy hearts, we mourn the martyrdom of Larijani, His loss is not just Iran’s loss, but a wound felt across the entire Muslim world.”

title: SRS Group case: court directs restitution of properties worth ₹650 crore to 2,312 homebuyers
content: The ED had initiated its probe under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act against SRS Group based on 81 cases registered by the police in Delhi, Haryana’s Faridabad, and the Central Bureau of Investigation

title: Countries should consider vaccination for groups at highest risk of severe COVID-19 disease
content: The WHO’s Strategic Advisory Group of Experts on Immunization recommends two doses of the routine COVID-19 vaccination per year, six months apart, for highest risk groups including the oldest adults, and older adults with significant comorbidities or severe obesity

title: BJP demands Rahul Gandhi’s resignation over USCIRF report “endorsement”
content: The report has recommended sanctions on the Research & Analysis Wing (R&AW) and the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS)

title: Amid LPG crisis, demand for rocket stoves surges in Kerala
content: Rocket stoves are high in demand as they require less firewood compared to regular wood stoves; as orders surge, stove suppliers have stopped accepting fresh orders

title: Flight diversion leaves passengers stranded inside aircraft in Chennai for hours
content: According to passengers, they boarded the Air India Express flight in Dehradun at 2.55 p.m. Around 20 minutes before it could land in Bengaluru, it was diverted to Chennai

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: civic issues take centre stage as electors in Chepauk-Thiruvallikeni call for permanent solutions, improved security
content: The DMK stronghold is set for a 4-cornered contest, with the ruling party and its allies, the AIADMK and BJP, TVK, and NTK in the fray. A few party representatives say they expect a narrow victory margin as it is likely that voters aged 18-30 may back parties such as TVK over the Dravidian majors

title: Ambulance drivers sensitised to Model Code of Conduct rules in Vellore, nearby districts
content: The guidelines say ambulance drivers should cooperate with Static Surveillance Teams during vehicle checks

title: Modi speaks to Kuwait Crown Prince; says safe, free navigation through Strait of Hormuz top priority
content: In their telephonic conversation, the two leaders agree that sustained diplomatic engagement remains essential for regional peace and stability

title: Assam Congress weighs MP’s flight to BJP
content: The fate of Pradyut Bordoloi’s son, the Congress candidate from eastern Assam’s Margherita constituency, hangs in the balance

title: 22 India-bound ships on Hormuz evacuation list
content: Of these, 20 vessels have been assessed as critical to India’s energy security, carrying over 5 lakh tonnes of LNG and LPG and 16.76 lakh tonnes of crude oil; various agencies join hands for evacuation

title: Lok Sabha ‘guillotines’ Demands for Grants worth ₹53 lakh crore
content: Union Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan says Modi government ‘committed to transform society, improving lives, and shaping the future of the nation’

title: Karnataka Information Commission brings Apex Bank under RTI Act
content: As the State Co-op Apex Bank has now now declared as public authority, the information relating to its functioning including financial decisions, will now be subject to public scrutiny under RTI

title: India sustains progress in reducing child deaths amid slowing global gains, says new UN report
content: The region’s under-five mortality has fallen significantly — from 92 deaths per 1,000 live births in 2000 to nearly 32 in 2024, reflecting sustained progress in child health outcomes, the Union Health Ministry says

title: Protests, dejection and call for retirement after several Trinamool Congress MLAs lose the ticket
content: In the list of candidates announced on March 17, Trinamool Congress has dropped around 74 legislators and shifted another 15 MLA to different constituencies

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Congress candidate selection in limbo
content: After several rounds of meetings and consultations, central election committee of the party could not resolve the issue of allowing MPs from the State to contest the Assembly elections

title: Tribal Affairs Minister meets Vietnam counterpart to discuss Memorandum of Cooperation
content: Draft memorandum approved; Tribal Affairs Minister invited to Vietnam to witness signing of final agreement; collaboration potential in livelihood promotion, value addition to forest products, sustainable agriculture, skill development, research partnerships, and cultural documentation.

title: Are publication of books, manufacture of prasadam by temples an industrial activity, Supreme Court asks
content: The question was posed by Justice B.V. Nagarathna, who is part of a nine-judge Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant examining the ambit of the definition of ‘industry’ and whether it would include charities and hospitals

title: China-bound Russian oil tanker diverted to India
content: Aqua Titan carrying 7.7 lakh barrels of crude makes U-turn in Southeast Asia, heading towards Mangalore port; analyst says ship part of the ‘dark fleet’ mostly controlled by the Russian state

title: Congress says Pradyut Bordoloi’s exit ‘unfortunate’, accuses BJP of poaching its leaders
content: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra says differences over ticket allocation may have triggered Bordoloi’s exit. MP Manickam Tagore says a traitor who switches sides in the middle of the battlefield cannot escape the judgment of the people.

title: 2-3 drones sighted along India’s border every day: Parliament panel report
content: As many as 967 cases of drone incursions occurred, which were intercepted or neutralised, resulting in the seizure of 710 ammunitions, 75 arms and 641 kg of drugs, the MHA has said

title: Second edition of IOS SAGAR set to boost maritime cooperation in Indian Ocean Region
content: Designed as a unique operational engagement programme, IOS SAGAR enables naval personnel from friendly foreign countries to train and sail together onboard an Indian Naval ship

title: Gandhi Bunakar mela opens in Vijayawada
content: The national-level handloom exhibition aimed at supporting handloom weavers and promoting traditional textiles will continue till March 31

title: Where’s the Minister, asks Speaker; says Question Hour more important than meetings
content: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla also urges MPs not to chat when the House takes up obituary references, says it is not a good practice

title: HC directive on removing Prosopis juliflora hailed: MDMK leader Vaiko to start a people’s movement
content: The MDMK leader said that the court, on realising the gravity of the situation with regard to the presence of karuvelam trees, and how they affect the water table and cause other problems, had given a comprehensive order.

title: BJP urges traditional Ugadi celebrations to strengthen community bonds
content: Visit prominent temples in villages across districts and actively participate in the celebrations along with local communities, says party State president

title: Ugadi festivities at Kanaka Durga temple to commence on March 19
content: In view of heavy rush during weekends and festival days, new parking regulations have been introduced as per the directions of the State Home Department

title: Father and son lost elections… but both won in Supreme Court | TN Elections with The Hindu
content: P.H. Pandian and his son P.H. Manoj Pandian may have lost at the ballot box, but secured a crucial legal victory in the Supreme Court. Here’s how their case unfolded.

title: Sri Lanka ready to welcome and support refugees from India: Minister Bimal Rathnayake
content: The Cabinet Minister requests Governments of India and Tamil Nadu to refrain from using them as ‘political propaganda tool’

title: Expelled Trinamool leader Humayun Kabir's party to contest 182 seats in West Bengal
content: The newly floated Aam Janata Unnayan Party will field a Muslim candidate against Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in the high-profile Bhabanipur constituency

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: IUML bets on youth, ushers in generational shift
content: Breaking from expectations of retaining most of its 15 sitting MLAs, whose average age is above 63, the party introduced 11 new faces, including six young leaders, two women and one non-Muslim candidate

title: Why MGR’s election from Andipatti was challenged in court
content: The petitions did not question the polling or counting process. Instead, they raised a legal issue: whether MGR was constitutionally qualified to contest at all, in view of how and before whom he had made and subscribed the oath or affirmation mandated under Article 173 (a) of the Constitution.

title: Complete repair work of elephant trenches and hanging solar fences in Kodagu: Khandre
content: The Minister notes that 38% of deaths caused by human-wildlife conflict in the State occur in Kodagu district and directs officials to increase patrolling

title: Miami (Ohio): SMU win 'proved doubters wrong'
content: After much debate in the lead-up to NCAA tournament selections, Miami (Ohio) beat SMU in the First Four on Wednesday night.

title: Prairie View A&M's run continues in First Four win
content: One year after winning only five games, Prairie View A&M continued its dramatic turnaround by earning its first NCAA tournament victory, a 67-55 triumph over Lehigh on Wednesday night in the First Four.

title: LeBron's 6 dunks key Lakers' 7th straight win
content: LeBron James put on a show Wednesday night in Houston as the Lakers matched their winning streak to a season-best seven games.

title: NFL to consider 5-year window for pick trades
content: The Browns are proposing a rule change that would allow NFL teams to trade draft picks five years into the future instead of three.

title: Kerr to the point: Dubs 'going to be in the play-in'
content: After a sixth loss in seven games, Warriors coach Steve Kerr laid bare the cold reality his team has been facing as it hobbles toward the regular season's conclusion: "We're going to be in the play-in. We know that."

title: Enfield denies misleading NCAA on Edwards' injury
content: SMU coach Andy Enfield said standout guard B.J. Edwards sat out Wednesday's loss to Miami (Ohio) in the First Four because he didn't feel "game ready" after the team announced last Friday that he would be available for the tournament.

title: Sources: WNBA cap set to top $10M by end of CBA
content: The projected salary cap under the pending WNBA collective bargaining agreement is set to exceed $10 million by the end of the agreement, sources told ESPN on Wednesday.

title: R.I. team wins state title after tragic rink shooting
content: The R.I. high school hockey team that was on the ice during a mass shooting in the stands last month capped its season with a state title Wednesday, with Colin Dorgan -- who lost 3 family members in the tragedy -- scoring the equalizer late in regulation.

content: Let's break down the main free agency signings, latest buzz on moves and biggest remaining questions for every team.

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: At last, WNBA and union 'aligned' on new CBA
content: The salary cap of the new CBA will reportedly start at $7 million, with the supermax salary starting at $1.4 million.

title: HOF won't give puck to Hughes: Not his to own
content: The Hockey Hall of Fame said it will not give Jack Hughes the puck from his gold-medal-winning goal at the Milan Cortina Olympics.

title: Even in Team USA defeat, the World Baseball Classic is a win for all of baseball
content: Denied gold by a Venezuelan team that symbolized the event at its best, Bryce Harper and the U.S. couldn't help but relish in the beauty of the WBC.

title: Lionel Messi has scored his 900th career goal! Can he reach 1,000? Can he pass Ronaldo?
content: Lionel Messi is never far from his next record or landmark. As the 2026 MLS season continues, he has hit yet another huge milestone: his 900th goal.

title: UCL talking points: Are Arsenal favorites? Is anyone game enough to write off Madrid?
content: And then there were eight! With the UCL round of 16 done and dusted, ESPN's Mark Ogden, Tom Hamilton, Gab Marcotti and Alex Kirkland break down the action and what it means.

title: Roared on by Anfield, Liverpool finally found the hunger they've been missing
content: The win over Galatasaray felt like the night that Anfield found its voice and helped Liverpool find themselves.

title: Kiper's new NFL mock draft: How free agency shook up first-round landing spots for top prospects
content: Team needs have shifted in free agency, so how will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the NFL draft's first 32 picks.

title: 20 contenders, 20 lingering weaknesses: Barnwell fixes roster holes as free agency slows down
content: Will Aaron Rodgers check the QB box for the Steelers? Can the Seahawks find running back help? And is there something the Chiefs can do at cornerback?

content: Which players are Tristan H. Cockcroft higher on than most? Here's a list of 20 names to keep in mind when drafting your 2026 rosters.

title: Men's tournament: Best bets for the round of 64, plus Eliminator picks
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Atleti want Arsenal's Martinelli, Jesus
content: Atlético Madrid are reportedly interested in both Arsenal's Gabriel Martinelli and Gabriel Jesus. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: Women's boxing pound-for-pound rankings: Gabriela Fundora's dominance fuels her rise
content: Gabriela Fundora delivers another KO to break into the top three. Here are the latest women's pound-for-pound rankings.

title: With Hormuz Shut, Saudi's Yanbu Is Gulf's Only Oil Hope. It's Being Attacked
content: Saudi Arabia's oil giant Aramco's 'Samref' refinery in the Red Sea port of Yanbu has been hit in an aerial strike after similar attacks on energy facilities in Qatar and the UAE in response to US-Israeli attacks on Iranian energy installations.

title: 8 Bullets, 10 Seconds: Chandigarh Realtor Shot Dead Outside Gym
content: A property dealer was shot dead outside a gym in Chandigarh when two unidentified bike-borne attackers rained bullets on him on Wednesday.

title: After MP Pradyut Bordoloi Joined BJP, Son Exits From Congress Poll Race
content: After Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi quit the Congress to join the BJP, his son Prateek has decided not to contest as a nominee of the grand old party from Margherita assembly constituency in the upcoming assembly polls.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates: Sensex Crashes 1,700 Points, Nifty Down 500 As Oil Crosses $110
content: Stock Market Live Updates Sensex Today: Markets witnessed a gap-down opening due to soaring oil prices.

title: All About Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Plant Hit In Israeli Strikes
content: Iran and Russia both allege that a projectile struck the grounds of the Bushehr nuclear power plant in the Islamic Republic, raising the specter of a radiological incident as Tehran's war with Israel and the United States rages.

title: Heavy Rain, Strong Winds Kill 18 In Pakistan's Karachi
content: Heavy rain and strong winds left at least 18 people dead in Pakistan's financial capital Karachi, city authorities and rescue services said on Thursday.

title: After 4 Failed Attempts, Dawood Ibrahim's Plots In Maharashtra Find A Buyer
content: All four land parcels are located in Mumbake village in the Ratnagiri district, considered to be Dawood Ibrahim's ancestral village.

title: 'Patience Is Limited': Saudi Threatens To Join Gulf War Amid Iran's Attacks
content: Amid Iran's continued attacks on the energy facilities of its Middle Eastern neighbours, Saudi Arabia's foreign minister, Prince Faisal bin Farhan Al Saud, has warned Tehran that tolerance of his country and other Gulf states is limited.

title: Iran Attacks World's Biggest Gas Hub In Qatar. How It Affects India
content: Turmoil in international oil and gas markets has intensified following an Iranian missile attack on Ras Laffan, Qatar's largest Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) plant.

title: Swap And Steal: Hyderabad Man Arrested For Replacing Gold Rings With Fake
content: He would browse gold rings like any other customer, wait for a moment when the staff looked away, and quietly swap the originals with fake pieces, a pattern that ended once Hyderabad police identified him.

title: Why Ex-US Counterterrorism Chief Mentioned Late Wife In Resignation Letter
content: Joe Kent, the former director of the US National Counterterrorism Centre, resigned from hispost, saying he could no longer support President Donald Trump administration's war on Iran, adding Tehran "posed no imminent threat to our nation."

title: Heavyweight Candidates Put Kerala's Vattiyoorkavu In Spotlight
content: The Vattiyoorkavu assembly constituency in the Kerala capital has emerged as one of the most closely watched battlegrounds in the April 9 Assembly elections, with three high-profile candidates turning the contest into a keen political fight.

title: West Bengal Election 2026: Factors That Make Bhabanipur A Key Battleground
content: The spotlight is firmly on the Bhabanipur Assembly constituency, where a direct contest between Mamata Banerjee and Suvendu Adhikari has turned the seat into a high-stakes battle.

title: Russia Agrees To Halt Recruitment Of Kenyans For Military Service In Ukraine
content: Russia has agreed to stop recruiting Kenyan citizens to fight with its army in Ukraine, Kenya's foreign minister said Monday after talks with his Russian counterpart in Moscow.

title: Iran To Lebanon To Iraq: Heavy Casualties Reported Amid US-Israel-Iran War
content: Thousands have died across the Middle East following US and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory Iranian strikes, with casualties reported in Iran, Lebanon, Iraq, Israel, and other countries.

title: HDFC Bank Chairman Quits Citing 'Ethical' Concerns, Shares Fall, RBI Reacts
content: HDFC Bank's part-time chairman and independent director Atanu Chakraborty resigned with immediate effect on Wednesday.

title: As Missiles And Drones Rule Skies, Gulf Countries Prepare For Eid On Friday
content: Amid intermittent missile and drone attacks, sirens, and a palpable sense of uncertainty, citizens and residents across the Gulf region are preparing for an unprecedented Eid on Friday, marking the end of the fasting month of Ramzan.

title: Iran War LIVE: Tehran Intensifies Strikes On Gulf Energy Facilities After Israel Hits Iranian Gas Field
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: Iran has been striking its Persian Gulf neighbours' energy facilities since the war started on February 28, and has made the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, nearly impassable.
